paper.title: OpenAI acquires Software Applications Incorporated, maker of Sky
paper.abstract: OpenAI has acquired Software Applications Incorporated, maker of Sky—a natural language interface for Mac that brings AI directly into your desktop experience. Together, we’re integrating Sky’s deep macOS capabilities into ChatGPT to make AI more intuitive, contextual, and action-oriented.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
